summary: Defined all 15 entity TypeScript types matching er-diagram.md, SetsConfig discriminated union, all 9 service interfaces from tech-design, error types with codes, and implemented SnowflakeIdGenerator with 41-bit timestamp + 10-bit machine-id + 12-bit sequence producing unique bigint biz_keys.
keyDecisions: Used bigint for all biz_key fields matching SQLite INTEGER 64-bit storage
SetsConfig uses discriminated union on mode field ('fixed' | 'custom')
Snowflake uses custom epoch 2024-01-01 for maximum timestamp range
Machine ID derivable from device fingerprint string via simple hash
All error types extend base AppError class with ErrorCode enum
TINYINT fields typed as 0 | 1 for SQLite boolean semantics

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: src/types/index.ts exports types for all 15 entities matching er-diagram.md field definitions
All service interfaces from tech-design defined
Error types defined with codes matching tech-design Error Handling section
generate() produces unique bigint values; generateBatch(n) produces n unique values
Unit tests for snowflake ID uniqueness and batch generation pass

notes: jest.config.js created with ts-jest preset as project had no test configuration. ESLint not configured in project (no eslint.config.js), lint step skipped.
